page_header.label: DAO TREASURY
page_header.title: Private Multi-Sig Operations
page_header.description: Multi-sig escrow with confidential execution. Treasury operations require M-of-N approval but execute through stealth addresses.

paragraphs: DAO treasuries are fully visible. Competitors know your runway. Contributors' compensation is public. Grant recipients are tracked.

Set up a multi-sig treasury with ZKIRA. Proposals require M-of-N approval from signers, but execution happens through stealth addresses. The governance is transparent, but the financial operations are confidential.
Your runway stays private. Contributor compensation is hidden. Grant recipients can't be tracked back to your DAO. Maintain decentralized governance with financial privacy.

items.title: Multi-Sig Setup
items.description: Configure M-of-N multi-sig with DAO signers. Set spending thresholds and approval requirements.

items.title: Propose Payment
items.description: Submit payment proposals with recipient and amount. Publicly visible for governance.

items.title: Collect Approvals
items.description: Signers approve or reject proposals on-chain. Transparent governance process maintained.

items.title: Execute Confidentially
items.description: Approved payments execute through stealth addresses. Amount and recipient stay private.

items.title: Treasury Privacy
items.description: Hide runway and spending patterns from competitors. Maintain strategic advantage.

items.title: Contributor Protection
items.description: Hide compensation amounts. Protect contributors from targeted attacks and doxxing.

items.title: Governance Transparency
items.description: On-chain approvals with confidential execution. Democracy with privacy.
